name: Neha Verma
summary: Product Manager with 3 years of experience in B2B SaaS and e-commerce products. Managed end-to-end feature delivery for 2 product lines. Strong in roadmapping, PRD writing, and stakeholder management. MBA from Symbiosis Institute of Business Management, Pune. Comfortable with Agile delivery and product analytics. Looking to work on AI-powered or data-driven products.

education.institution: Symbiosis Institute of Business Management (SIBM), Pune

experience.title: Product Manager
responsibilities: Managed roadmap for Shopalyst's Ad Placement Optimization product used by 50+ FMCG brands.
Led delivery of 4 quarterly feature launches, coordinating engineering (6 devs), data science, and design teams.
Conducted user interviews with brand managers and agency media planners (6–8 per quarter).
Created PRDs and user stories for 3 major feature areas; reduced average sprint rework to 12%.
Tracked product KPIs (CTR, ROAS, feature adoption) using internal BI dashboard and Amplitude.
Managed backlog of 95 items; facilitated bi-weekly backlog grooming sessions.

experience.title: Business Analyst
responsibilities: Gathered and documented requirements for a UK retail client's e-commerce re-platforming project.
Created 40+ user stories and facilitated UAT sessions.
Acted as liaison between offshore development team and onshore client stakeholders.

projects.name: Ad Placement Optimization – Self-Serve Module
projects.description: Led PRD + delivery of self-serve campaign setup for FMCG brands — reducing onboarding TAT from 5 days to same-day. Feature adopted by 28 brand clients within 60 days.
projects.impact: 28/50 brands adopted; ₹1.1 Crore in new contract renewals attributed

achievements: Shopalyst All-Hands Innovation Pitch – Runner-up (built AI campaign recommendation MVP)
